items.back: Keep speed adjustments to MINIMUM necessary. Avoid alternate decreases and increases. Terminate when no longer needed for required or desired spacing.

Instruct to: (1) maintain present/specific speed, (2) maintain specified speed or greater/less, (3) maintain highest/lowest practical speed, (4) increase or reduce to a specified speed or by a specified number of knots.

items.front: Minimum speed between FL280 and 10,000 feet (5-7-3a)
items.back: Not less than 250 knots or the equivalent Mach number.
Advise aircraft when speed adjustments are no longer needed. Use 'RESUME NORMAL SPEED' when no published speed restrictions apply and ATC-assigned speed is no longer required.
